Banner.Name: VUX
Banner.Description: I am a Full-stack Developer with over 8 years of experience building large-scale systems. On the **Backend**, I specialize in system architecture design, applying Design Patterns and clean code principles to ensure maintainability and scalability. On the **Frontend**, I focus on developing high-performance Web and Mobile applications using the Angular, Ionic, and Cordova ecosystem, ensuring optimal user experience across all devices.
AboutMe.Title: About Me
AboutMe.Paragraphs: With over 8 years of experience in the software industry, I have progressed from a System Analyst to a Technical Lead. My primary focus is building highly scalable systems, emphasizing sustainable code structure and optimizing real-world operational workflows.

My core strength lies in **Backend architecture**. I am proficient in implementing Clean Architecture, Modular Monolith, and various Design Patterns (such as Repository, Unit of Work, CQRS). I believe that a robust system starts from a well-structured foundation, making it easier to scale and maintain.

In parallel, I possess strong execution capabilities across multi-platform environments (Web & Mobile Hybrid) using the Angular, Ionic, and Cordova stack. Below are the technologies I master and frequently apply:
Experience.Title: Experience

Experience.Jobs.Title: Fullstack Developer
Description: Led technical decision-making
Recruited technical talent for the company
Head of the technology team
Built and maintained an internal process management platform for course sales
Developed custom functions and plugins to personalize the WordPress platform
Implemented continuous integration and daily backups
Participated in planning meetings and reporting

Experience.Jobs.Title: Fullstack Developer
Description: Built and maintained a monitoring platform with charts in WordPress
Developed features in templates and plugins to support monitoring requirements
Implemented continuous integration and daily backups

Built and maintained a second monitoring platform using Angular, Angular Material, Laravel, MySQL, RxJS, and Sass with configurable charts, alert systems, user management, and global parameter configuration
Participated in planning meetings and reporting

Experience.Jobs.Title: Independent
Description: Delivered continuous improvements across both frontend and backend
Built platforms using Angular, Laravel, and WordPress with functional, reactive, and object-oriented programming paradigms
Automated processes using structured data approaches
Designed interfaces using SASS, Bootstrap, Materialize, Bulma, etc.

Experience.Jobs.Title: Fullstack Developer
Description: Led a team of 4 developers to build a travel data management platform using Angular, Laravel, and MySQL
Implemented CI/CD on Azure and optimized application load time
Developed API interactions using RxJS
Built modules with complex reactive forms
Prepared weekly reports on goals and plans

Experience.Jobs.Title: Frontend Developer
Description: Built WordPress templates with ACF, implemented JavaScript/jQuery functionality, and styled using SASS
Improved design quality and template loading performance
Collaborated effectively with design teams using Avocode/Figma

Experience.Jobs.Title: System Analyst
Description: Developed new features for an employee management platform built with Angular and ExpressJS
Refactored legacy code and ensured dependency compatibility across updates, including Angular upgrades

Experience.Jobs.Title: English Teacher
Description: Taught basic English to over 200 students

FeatureProjects.Title: Featured Professional Experience
FeatureProjects.Label: Featured Project

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: iVIVU Train Ticket Booking System
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: A key project where I **served as the primary developer**. I built the entire flow from user interface to automated booking processing system. The system leverages Angular 19 and .NET 8, integrates WebSockets for real-time ticket status updates, and handles complex background processing tasks via Background Jobs.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Online Flight Booking Platform
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: I **contributed to the development** of key modules in iVIVU's flight booking system. Focused on optimizing flight search performance and integrating APIs from both domestic and international airlines. Ensured system stability during peak promotional periods with high traffic loads.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Hotel Booking Portal
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: Contributed to the **development and maintenance** of a global hotel booking system. Responsible for optimizing SEO metadata for destination pages and improving mobile user experience. Participated in building advanced filtering features and managing customer reviews.

FeatureProjects.Projects.Title: Plutos Agent Application
FeatureProjects.Projects.Description: A cross-platform mobile application designed for partners and agents, integrating hotel and flight services. I **served as Lead Developer**, using Ionic Framework to optimize performance across iOS and Android. The system enables agents to manage cash flow, track order status in real-time, and execute bookings efficiently through deeply integrated APIs.

OtherProjects.Title: Notable Side Projects

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: E-learning & Online Examination System
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: Developed an E-learning platform supporting multiple exam formats (multiple choice, essay) and integrated monetization for learning materials. Applied a service-oriented architecture in Angular with flexible interfaces and component systems.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: Payment Gateway & Transaction Orchestration System
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: Designed and developed a middleware gateway system integrating directly with Bao Kim. Applied Clean Architecture to clearly separate business logic, ensuring maintainability and scalability. Led backend development for payment processing flows, webhook integrations, and built an admin dashboard for reconciliation and merchant management.

OtherProjects.Projects.Title: Football Academy Management System (VietGoal)
OtherProjects.Projects.Description: Designed and developed a microservices-based system on .NET 8 to manage academy operations, separating domains such as student management, coach coordination, finance, and commerce. Built for scalability and large-scale operations. The admin interface was developed with Angular and Ant Design, focusing on UX and optimizing data entry and real-time reporting workflows.

Contact.Title: Get In Touch
Contact.Content: I am always open to new opportunities and challenges. If you find my profile suitable for your needs, feel free to send me an email or connect with me عبر the social platforms below. I will respond as soon as possible.
